title: sarothamnus striatus f. gallecicus
intro: Sarothamnus striatus f. gallecicus, also known as the Pyrenean broom or Spanish broom, is a subspecies of the shrub Sarothamnus scoparius. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Sarothamnus striatus f. gallecicus include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and have antimicrobial properties. The herbal preparations of this plant, such as its leaves and flowers, can be used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
